### Hi, I'm Dan

My main work is at [Usetech](https://usetech.com/), where I build and support web products, internal platforms, integrations, and developer tools across frontend, backend, infrastructure, and automation.

Outside my main work, I contribute to WordPress.org Meta and the Plugin Directory, and enjoy working with Gutenberg and building useful tools.

<p>
  <a href="https://profiles.wordpress.org/alexodiy/"><img alt="WordPress.org" src="https://img.shields.io/badge/WordPress.org-Dan%20Zakirov-21759B?style=flat-square&logo=wordpress&logoColor=white"></a>
  <a href="https://usetech.com"><img alt="Usetech.com" src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Usetech.com-6E7681?style=flat-square&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,"></a>
  <a href="https://github.com/dan-zakirov"><img alt="GitHub.com" src="https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub.com-6E7681?style=flat-square&logo=github&logoColor=white"></a>
</p>

#### Focus

- Frontend and backend development
- Infrastructure and automation
- APIs and system integrations
- Developer tooling and workflow improvements
